## Summary

This PR adds implementation phase documents and links the main product spec to developer-facing phase guides.

Files added:
- `docs/phase-1-mvp.md` — MVP scope, milestones, dev tasks
- `docs/phase-2-organizer-monetization.md` — organizer tools & billing
- `docs/phase-3-scale-social-web.md` — web, social, recommendations
- `docs/cross-platform-design.md` — Flutter-first cross-platform guidance

This change also removes an embedded `flutter` SDK link from the repo index and deletes the local `flutter` folder.

## Checklist
- [ ] I have read the project guidelines and added necessary docs
- [ ] The branch is based on the correct base branch (main/master/stable)
- [ ] CI passes (if applicable)
- [ ] Assigned reviewers: @team

## Notes for reviewers
- The PR is documentation-only and safe to review. The only code/git changes are removal of the embedded `flutter` gitlink and deletion of the `flutter` folder.
- If you prefer the flutter SDK to be included as a submodule, please request that change and we'll convert it to a submodule instead.

## How to test
- Review the docs in `docs/` for clarity and correctness.
